Authentik._comment: Local Authentik instance (docker-compose up). ClientId/ClientSecret match the blueprint in infrastructure/authentik/blueprints/.

Bff._comment: Local Authentik BFF provider (Cookie+OIDC). ClientId/ClientSecret match the blueprint in infrastructure/authentik/blueprints/.

Redaction._comment: PII redaction HMAC key for deterministic hashing. In production use the env var instead of inline HmacKey.
Redaction.HmacKeyNote: Development/debug only. Do not use this key in Release/Production; prefer APITEMPLATE_REDACTION_HMAC_KEY environment variable.

Serilog._comment: Debug-level logging for development. Production overrides in appsettings.Production.json use Information + file sink.
